title: sticherus umbraculifer
intro: Sticherus umbraculifer, also known as the umbrella fern or umbrella tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia. It is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its antitussive properties. The health benefits of Sticherus umbraculifer include its potential to reduce inflammation and relieve symptoms associated with bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
